summary: Iteration 38: Video preload feature and Cloudinary auto-migration verified. MainLanding page loads with 2 product cards (sauny + balie), both videos have preload='auto' attribute and Cloudinary poster, <link rel='preload' as='video'> tags are injected in document head. Backend /api/settings/main-landing returns Cloudinary video URLs. Auto-migration executes on startup (6 known video errors - pre-existing issues). Contact form and navigation work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: MainLanding.jsx correctly implements video preload feature:
- Line 145: video elements have preload='auto' attribute
- Line 146: poster attribute uses getVideoPoster() helper for Cloudinary first-frame poster
- Lines 217-231: useEffect injects <link rel='preload' as='video'> tags in document head
- Lines 35-43: useEffect eagerly loads video on component mount with el.load()
- Lines 3744-3745: _auto_cloudinary_migration() is called in startup_init if CLOUDINARY_CONFIGURED
- Lines 3748-3805: Migration function processes pending images and videos from Object Storage to Cloudinary
seed_data_creation: Created test contact form submission with name 'TEST_VideoPreload'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video preload feature is fully implemented and working. Videos on MainLanding page have preload='auto', Cloudinary poster images, and <link rel='preload'> tags. Auto-migration runs on startup but 6 pre-existing videos fail (2 too large, 4 invalid format) - these are known issues not related to the new feature.

main_landing_page_loads.details: Page loads with 2 product cards (sauny + balie)

video_preload_auto_attribute.details: Both video elements have preload='auto' attribute

video_poster_attribute.details: Both videos have Cloudinary poster attribute using getVideoPoster() helper

link_preload_video_tags.details: 2 <link rel='preload' as='video'> tags injected in document head for both videos

video_playback_on_hover.details: Visual verification shows videos play on hover (different frames visible in screenshots)

api_main_landing_settings.details: /api/settings/main-landing returns sauna_video and balia_video Cloudinary URLs

cloudinary_auto_migration_startup.details: Backend logs show 'Cloudinary auto-migration: 0 images, 6 videos pending...' on startup

contact_form_submission.details: Contact form submits successfully, shows 'Dziękujemy!' success message

navigation_buttons.details: Sauny, Balie, Blog, B2B navigation buttons work correctly

auto_migration_video_errors.description: 6 pre-existing videos fail migration (2 too large - 413 error, 4 invalid format)
auto_migration_video_errors.note: These are known pre-existing issues, not related to the new video preload feature
